changelog.summary: GuestsTab UX fixes: GU-05, GU-06, GU-10
changes: Verified - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-05): Attending Count Override section is already conditionally rendered only when household status is 'RSVP Yes'. No code change needed — marking complete.
Bugfix - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-06): Kippot stat card label changed from 'Kippot' to 'Kippot Needed' and sub-label from 'males invited' to 'males on guest list' for clarity.

Bugfix - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-10): RSVP Date input now shows a soft amber warning below the field when the selected date is more than 30 days in the future, matching the postal code warning pattern. Saving is never blocked — the warning is advisory only. Applied to both Add mode (step 1) and Edit mode (Details tab).

changelog.summary: AccommodationsTab UX fixes: ST-02, ST-03, ST-04
changes: Bugfix - AccommodationsTab.jsx (ST-02): check-in and check-out dates now include the year in display (e.g. 'Oct 17, 2026' instead of 'Oct 17')

Bugfix - AccommodationsTab.jsx (ST-03): accommodation edit modal close button now has title='Close'. Note: the edit pencil button already had title='Edit accommodation details' and required no change.

Bugfix - AccommodationsTab.jsx (ST-04): Notified and Booked toggle tooltip labels no longer use confusing double-negative phrasing. When active: 'Remove notified status' / 'Remove booked status'. When inactive: 'Mark as notified' / 'Mark as booked'.

changelog.summary: BudgetTab UX fixes: BU-01, BU-02, BU-03
changes: Bugfix - BudgetTab.jsx (BU-01): Amount field now shows a $ prefix symbol inside the input, using the same inset span pattern already used in the Gratuity Calculator. paddingLeft:22 added to prevent text overlapping the symbol.

Bugfix - BudgetTab.jsx (BU-02): delta values on expense rows now have a space between the arrow symbol and the dollar amount ('▼ $1,875' instead of '▼$1,875'). The stat card and tooltip variants already had correct spacing.

Bugfix - BudgetTab.jsx (BU-03): Add Expense category no longer defaults to 'Attire & Accessories' (EXPENSE_CATEGORIES[0]). Now defaults to empty string with a '— Select category —' placeholder option, requiring the user to make an intentional selection.

changelog.summary: Data display fixes: VE-03, VE-04, GI-01, GI-03
changes: Bugfix - VendorModal.jsx (VE-03): City input placeholder changed from 'Springfield' to 'City'
Bugfix - VendorModal.jsx (VE-04): country field now defaults to 'United States' on new vendor, matching the pattern used in GuestsTab and GiftsTab address forms
Bugfix - GiftsTab.jsx (GI-01): City input placeholder changed from 'Springfield' to 'City' in the gift donor address form

Bugfix - GiftsTab.jsx (GI-03): Attended column now shows a styled checkbox indicator (green checkmark / red X / muted empty box) consistent with the Written and Mailed columns. Previously showed text 'Y'/'N'/'—' which was visually inconsistent with the checkbox pattern used by Written and Mailed.

changelog.summary: GuestsTab UX fixes: GU-04, GU-09, GU-12, GU-13
changes: Bugfix - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-09): Attending Adults and Attending Kids override inputs now clamp to 0 via Math.max(0, ...) on change, preventing negative values even when pasted. min='0' HTML attribute alone did not prevent paste-in of negative numbers.

Bugfix - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-12): all modal close (✕) buttons now have title='Close' for tooltip and screen reader support. Covers HouseholdModal, ImportModal, TimelineEntryModal, Delete Household confirm modal, and GuestExportModal (the last was already titled).

Bugfix - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-04): RSVP Date input now shows a formatted date hint below the field when a date is set (e.g. 'Sat, Oct 17, 2026'). The raw ISO value (YYYY-MM-DD) shown by the browser's date picker is no longer the only representation visible to the user.
Bugfix - GuestsTab.jsx (GU-13): bulk select checkbox label changed from 'All' to 'Select All' for clarity.

changelog.summary: New — Backup file download and Restore from Backup
changes: New — router.js: GET /:boardId/api/admin/backup endpoint — requires admin password as query param, returns full board state as a downloadable .json file with Content-Disposition attachment header. Strips adminPassword and archiveUnlockCode from download. Blocked on archived events.

New — router.js: POST /:boardId/api/admin/restore endpoint — requires admin password + backup JSON payload, validates payload contains recognizable collections, writes all known collections to state, broadcasts to all clients. Preserves adminPassword and archiveUnlockCode. Blocked on archived events.
New — AdminPanel.jsx: '⬇ Download File' button added to Export Full Backup modal alongside existing Copy to Clipboard. Clicking triggers the backup download endpoint directly from the browser.

New — AdminPanel.jsx: 'Restore from Backup' section added in Admin → Data between Export and Archive. Two-step confirmation: select .json file, type RESTORE BACKUP. Clear instructions describe what is restored vs preserved. Blocked on archived events with explanation. Success state with option to restore again.
New — ui.js: 'Export & backup' guide entry updated to mention both Copy to Clipboard and Download File options.
New — ui.js: 'Restoring from backup' guide entry added to Getting Started section with step-by-step instructions.

Changed to double-escaped \\n so the browser receives the correct escape sequence.

changes: Fix — server.js: switchTab(\'all\') and switchTab(\'issues\') in onclick attributes used backslash-escaped single quotes which are invalid inside a JS template literal, causing an 'Invalid or unexpected token' syntax error that prevented all log viewer functions from loading. Replaced with plain single quotes.

changelog.summary: Improved server log viewer — persistent WARN/ERROR buffer, alert banner, Issues tab, refresh interval
changes: New — server.js: separate warnErrBuffer (200 entries) captures all WARN and ERROR entries independent of the INFO ring buffer. WARN/ERROR entries can never be pushed out by INFO churn.
New — server.js: WARN and ERROR entries are appended to logs/warn-error.log on disk, surviving server restarts. The logs/ directory is auto-created on startup.
New — server.js: /api/logs response now includes warnCount, errorCount, lastIssue timestamp, and issueEntries (the dedicated WARN/ERROR buffer).
New — server.js: sticky alert banner appears at the top of the log viewer whenever WARNs or ERRORs exist. Red for errors, amber for warnings. Clicking jumps to the Issues tab.
New — server.js: dedicated Issues tab shows only the persistent WARN/ERROR buffer. Auto-selected on page load when errors are present. Badge on tab button shows total issue count.
New — server.js: Last Issue stat card shows time since most recent WARN or ERROR (e.g. '3m ago' or 'never').
New — server.js: refresh interval selector (1s / 5s / 30s) replaces the hardcoded 5s interval.
New — server.js: Copy Log and Download Log now operate on the active tab's entries (all logs or issues only).
New — server.js: fs module added (required for disk log writing). No impact on DraftKit or SimchaKit modules.

Separate table sets and seat assignments per sub-event (e.g. kiddush at Chizuk Amuno and evening party at Suburban Club). tableId on person becomes tableAssignments: { [sectionId]: tableId }. Migration from flat tableId is automatic. Requires SeatingTab to manage multiple chart contexts.

changelog.summary: Fix — By Person export shows table name instead of raw ID
changes: Fix — guests.js: exportGuestsByPerson() now accepts a tables array and resolves each person's tableId to the human-readable table name. Falls back to the raw ID if the table is not found.
Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: GuestExportModal now receives state?.tables and passes it through to exportGuestsByPerson.

changelog.summary: New — Guest list export modal with four formats
changes: New — guests.js: exportGuestsByHousehold() — one CSV row per household with formal name, RSVP status, invited/attending headcounts, kosher count, save-the-date/invite sent flags, sub-events invited to, and full split address. Sorted by last name.

New — guests.js: exportGuestsByPerson() — one CSV row per individual with first/last name, title, household, group, RSVP status, adult/child, meal choice, kosher flag, dietary notes, shirt size, table ID, and confirmed sub-events. Sorted by last name then first name.

New — guests.js: generateGuestPrintHTML() — print-ready HTML page grouped by group (Family, Friends, etc.) with household names, member list, RSVP status badge, headcount, kosher flag, and dietary notes. Summary stats header (households, people, confirmed, kosher). Respects event theme palette.

New — GuestsTab.jsx: GuestExportModal component with four option cards (By Household, By Person, Mailing / Invitations, Printable View). Each card has an icon, bold label, and descriptive explanation matching the seating export modal pattern. CSV preview textarea with copy-to-clipboard. Print preview in iframe.

Changed — GuestsTab.jsx: 'Export for Invitations' button in tab header replaced with '↓ Export Guests' button. Old single-format modal replaced by GuestExportModal + print preview modal. Mailing / Invitations option reuses existing exportToInvitationCSV — no change to that format.

Changed — ui.js: New 'Exporting guests' guide entry added to Guests section describing all four export formats and their intended audiences. Top-level 'Export & backup' guide entry updated to reference the new modal.

changelog.summary: New — Sub-event scoped seating chart
changes: New — SeatingTab.jsx: Seating Setup panel (collapsible, same pattern as Favors) with 'This event has assigned seating' toggle and 'Seating for which sub-event?' selector. Config saved to state.seating.config and persists across sessions.

New — SeatingTab.jsx: all seating content gated behind setup. When hasSeating=false or no sub-event selected, a placeholder card explains what to do. When configured, unseated panel shows only people with that sub-event in attendingSections.
New — SeatingTab.jsx: TBD count shown in Unseated stat card and unseated panel header. TBD = people in a household invited to this sub-event but attendingSections not yet set.
New — SeatingTab.jsx: AssignModal available list scoped to confirmed attendees of the active sub-event.

Changed — OverviewTab.jsx: seating gap warning now scoped to configured seating sub-event. Only shows when seating is configured for a specific sub-event and confirmed attendee count exceeds total seat capacity for that sub-event.
Changed — state.js: seating added to ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS and DEFAULTS ({ config: {} }).
Changed — ws.js: seating collection added to statePayload broadcast.
Changed — ui.js: Seating guide updated with Seating Setup, TBD attendees, and Seating gap warning entries. Sub-event attendance entry updated.

changelog.summary: Fix — SeatingTab crash: adminConfig not defined
changes: Fix — SeatingTab.jsx: adminConfig was used in the unseated sub-event filter UI but was not in scope. Added const adminConfig = state?.adminConfig || {} at the top of the component, consistent with how it is accessed elsewhere in the file.

changelog.summary: New — Sub-event attendance tracking (two-tier model)
changes: New — GuestsTab.jsx: Tier 1 — household Sub-Events Invited To checklist replaces single eventSection dropdown. Options derived from adminConfig.timeline sorted by date. Migration: legacy eventSection string auto-converts to eventSections array on modal open.

New — GuestsTab.jsx: Tier 2 — per-person Attending Sub-Events checklist replaces isAttending boolean. Shows only sections the household is invited to. Empty = TBD. attendingAdults/attendingKids override UI removed (data preserved silently for backward compatibility).

New — GuestsTab.jsx: Guest Insights Chart 4 — Attendance by Sub-Event horizontal bar chart showing confirmed vs. invited headcount per timeline entry. Hidden until at least one household has sections assigned.

New — FavorsTab.jsx: favor setup now includes Distributed at which sub-event? selector. Attendance column derived automatically from person attendingSections — no manual Yes/No/TBD entry. trackAttendance toggle removed.

New — SeatingTab.jsx: unseated panel filter bar gains All Sub-Events dropdown. Filters unseated people by their confirmed attendingSections. Only shown when at least one unseated person has sections assigned.
Changed — OverviewTab.jsx: RSVPs Confirmed stat and seating gap warning now count people with attendingSections.length > 0 instead of household-level attendingAdults/attendingKids overrides.

Changed — guests.js: getHouseholdAttending updated — when any household member has attendingSections set, derives adult/kid counts from per-person data. Falls back to household overrides then invited counts for backward compatibility.
Changed — guests.js: computeHouseholdCounts attending count uses attendingSections.length > 0 instead of isAttending === true.
Changed — guests.js: exportToInvitationCSV sort uses same trim/filter(Boolean) guard as GuestsTab.
Changed — guest-constants.js: DEFAULT_SECTIONS removed — sections now derived from timeline.
Changed — ui.js: Guide updated — new Sub-event attendance entry, Households vs. people updated, RSVP-aware counts updated, Favor tracking updated.
Roadmap — added: Multiple favors distributed at different sub-events (P4, Low effort, future).

changelog.summary: Fix — guest sort corrupted by trailing spaces in formalName
changes: Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: sort comparator now uses .trim().split(' ').filter(Boolean).pop() so trailing spaces in formalName no longer produce an empty sort key that floats households to the top of the list
Fix — AccommodationsTab.jsx: same sort fix applied to the Stay & Travel household sort
Fix — GuestsTab.jsx HouseholdModal: formalName and name2 are now trimmed on save so trailing spaces cannot enter the data going forward

changelog.summary: Fix — modal backdrop drag-select no longer closes modal
changes: Fixed: drag-selecting text inside any modal and releasing the mouse outside the modal no longer closes the modal and discards unsaved input
Replaced onClick with onMouseDown + e.target === e.currentTarget guard on all 44 modal backdrop instances across 14 files
Removed ineffective user-select CSS workaround added in V2.58.2

changelog.summary: Fix — modal backdrop closes when drag-selecting text
changes: Fix — App.css: added user-select: none to .modal-backdrop and user-select: text to .modal — prevents the browser from registering a click on the backdrop when the user drag-selects text inside a modal field and releases the mouse outside the modal

changelog.summary: Fix — HouseholdModal: imported households with empty group correctly default to first group on modal open
changes: Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: HouseholdModal useState initializer split into edit and new paths — when editing a household with an empty group field (e.g. from CSV import), group now defaults to groups[0] on modal open rather than storing empty string until the user manually touches the select

changelog.summary: CSV import: expanded tool support — Evite, Google Contacts, WedSites, Joy, Paperless Post
changes: Feature — guests.js: mapRsvp() moved to module scope and expanded — now normalizes RSVP values from Evite (Yes/No/Maybe/No Reply/Viewed/Delivered/Sent), online-rsvp.com (not yet), WedSites (Confirmed/Regretfully decline/Not invited yet), RSVPify, and generic values; both import paths (household-centric and person-centric) now use the shared function
Fix — guests.js: household-centric import path previously passed raw Status value through without normalization — now uses mapRsvp() so Evite and similar tool statuses map correctly

Improvement — guests.js: FIELD_ALIASES expanded with Google Contacts columns (Given Name, Family Name, E-mail 1 - Value, Phone 1 - Value, Address 1 - Street/City/Region/Postal Code/Country), WedSites/Joy household grouping columns (household, party, group name), Paperless Post (name on envelope), and Evite RSVP Comment -> HouseholdNotes
Improvement — guests.js: RSVP Comment column mapped to HouseholdNotes so Evite guest comments are preserved on import
Improvement — guests.js: mapRsvp() added to module exports

Guide — ui.js: Importing guests from CSV guide entry updated to list all natively supported tools (Evite, online-rsvp.com, Google Contacts, WedSites, Joy, Paperless Post) and explain RSVP value mapping behavior

changelog.summary: CSV import: person-centric format support (online-rsvp.com and similar)
changes: Feature — guests.js: added constructFormalName() helper — constructs household formal name from member array; same-last-name couples use 'Julie & Jon Singer' format; mixed last names use full name format; 3+ members follow same rules

Feature — guests.js: importCSVToGuestData() now accepts isPeopleCentric flag — when true, groups rows by HouseholdID (Group ID), constructs FormalName automatically, maps RSVP values from tool-specific values (not yet/yes/no) to SimchaKit statuses, and creates person records for all members

Feature — guests.js: detectColumnMapping() now detects person-centric CSVs — sets isPeopleCentric: true when First Name + Last Name columns exist but no FormalName equivalent; sets allMapped: true for person-centric format so mapping stage is skipped
Improvement — guests.js: FIELD_ALIASES updated — added 'group id'/'groupid' aliases for HouseholdID; added 'e-mail'/'e mail' alias for Email; added 'mobile phone' alias for Phone

Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal — isPeopleCentric state added; handleFile passes isPeopleCentric to importCSVToGuestData; handleApplyMapping updated to not require FormalName mapping when person-centric format detected
Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal preview stage — shows info notice when person-centric format was detected explaining that households were auto-grouped and formal names constructed
Guide — ui.js: 'Importing guests from CSV' guide entry updated to mention online-rsvp.com support, person-by-person format detection, automatic grouping by Group ID, and FormalName construction

changelog.summary: CSV guest import improvements
changes: Feature — guests.js: added FIELD_ALIASES exported constant — maps SimchaKit field names to arrays of recognized column name aliases for fuzzy column matching
Feature — guests.js: added detectColumnMapping() function — takes CSV headers array, returns suggested mapping with confidence levels (exact/alias), unmapped columns, and unmapped fields

Improvement — guests.js: importCSVToGuestData() rewritten — now accepts optional column mapping parameter, wraps each row in try/catch, returns { households, people, errors } with per-row error objects containing rowIndex, rawRow, and message
Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal updated — new 4-stage flow: upload, mapping (only shown when columns cannot be auto-resolved), preview, done
Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal upload stage — updated description to reflect that any CSV format is accepted, not just the SimchaKit template
Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal mapping stage — shows column mapping table with auto-matched indicators; user can reassign or skip any column; FormalName is required to proceed

Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal preview stage — import errors displayed prominently above the preview table, always visible, with row number and reason; valid rows still imported even when some rows have errors; Confirm button shows row count when errors exist
Improvement — GuestsTab.jsx: ImportModal happy path — if all columns auto-map with FormalName resolved, mapping stage is skipped entirely and user goes directly to preview
Guide — ui.js: added 'Importing guests from CSV' entry to Guests section

New — AdminPanel.jsx: Accommodations section now manages a hotelBlocks array. Each block has its own hotel name, group code, cut-off date, phone, and website fields rendered as a card. + Add Hotel Block button appends a new blank block. Remove button on each block (disabled when only one). Form initializer migrates legacy flat accom* fields into hotelBlocks[0] automatically.

New — AccommodationsTab.jsx: hotel info section now loops over hotelBlocks array (falls back to legacy flat fields for existing data). Each block renders its own card with an independent cut-off countdown. getCutoffBanner() helper replaces the single cutoffBanner computed value.
New — ui.js: Stay & Travel and Admin Mode hotel block guide entries updated to mention multiple hotel blocks and the + Add Hotel Block action.
Fix — audit-f1 resolved.

Fix — changelog.json: audit-f2 (Event Brief modal preview before printing) marked complete. The preview modal with iframe, Print / Save PDF button, and Close button was already implemented and fully meets the acceptance criteria. No code changes required.

New — App.jsx: mobile header collapse on scroll. Scroll listener added with requestAnimationFrame throttle and passive:true for performance. Sets headerCollapsed state when scrolling down past 60px, clears on scroll up. Mobile-only guard (window.innerWidth < 640). header-collapsed class applied to .app-header when active.

New — App.css: .header-collapsed selector collapses the event name row (row 2) via max-height: 0 and opacity: 0 with smooth 0.25s transitions. Row 2 gets explicit max-height: 40px and opacity: 1 in default state to enable the transition. Brand row and action icons always remain visible. Mobile only (@media max-width: 640px).
Fix — audit-m005 resolved.

Fix — App.jsx: nav More dropdown outside-click handler now also checks .nav-more-menu. Previously the mousedown handler fired before the item click event, dismissing the menu before the tab selection could register.

New — App.jsx: ResizeObserver on nav-inner measures rendered tab widths on every resize. Computes overflowFromIdx — the index at which tabs exceed available width (reserving 92px for the More button). Active tab in overflow is promoted into the visible row by hiding the last visible tab. Overflow tabs render with visibility:hidden + position:absolute so measurements are always accurate. More button uses getBoundingClientRect() to anchor the dropdown via position:fixed, sidestepping sticky nav stacking context issues.
New — App.jsx: showNavMore, navMoreAnchor state and outside-click handler added. Nav More dropdown reuses existing .header-overflow-item CSS for visual consistency.

New — App.css: overflow:hidden added to .app-nav to prevent tabs visually spilling past nav boundary. overflow-x changed from auto to visible on .nav-inner (scroll replaced by overflow menu). .nav-more-wrap, .nav-more-btn, .nav-more-menu CSS rules added.
Fix — CeremonyRolesTab.jsx: delete/reset confirm modal-footer moved inside modal-body. Same structural fix as V2.53.2 applied to the second modal in the file.

Fix — CeremonyRolesTab.jsx: RoleModal modal-footer moved inside modal-body to match established pattern (GiftsTab, HouseholdModal, etc.). Footer was previously a sibling of modal-body, causing it to receive no padding and the button to overflow the modal right edge.
Fix — App.jsx + AdminPanel.jsx: Ceremony Roles tab icon changed from ✡ to 📜, label shortened from 'Ceremony Roles' to 'Ceremony' to prevent nav overflow on desktop.
Fix — CeremonyRolesTab.jsx: RoleModal modal-body now has overflowY auto and maxHeight calc(85vh - 120px) so the footer button is never clipped on small viewports.
Fix — CeremonyRolesTab.jsx: Hebrew Name form label updated to 'Hebrew Name (optional)' to clarify the field is not required for all roles.
Fix — CeremonyRolesTab.jsx: empty state icon updated from ✡ to 📜 to match tab icon.

New — CeremonyRolesTab.jsx: new tab for assigning ceremony honors and service roles. Roles have section, role name, assignee, Hebrew name, notes, and sort order. Grouped by section with up/down reordering. Pre-built templates for bar/bat/bnei-mitzvah (Torah Service, English Readings, Service Participation) and wedding (Wedding Party, Ceremony Roles, Readings & Blessings). Template loads only when tab is empty. Reset to template option available. Mobile card layout at <640px. Stat cards: total, assigned, unassigned, sections.
New — App.jsx: CeremonyRolesTab imported and wired up. Tab added to ALL_TABS between Prep and Seating with icon ✡ and id 'ceremony'. Render block and placeholder exclusion updated.
New — AdminPanel.jsx: 'ceremony' tab added to Visible Tabs list and hardcoded default array.
New — DayOfOverlay.jsx: Ceremony Roles section added between Hot Sheet and Day-of Checklist. Grouped by section, read-only. Renders only when ceremonyRoles is non-empty.
New — exports.js: Ceremony Roles section added to generateEventBriefHTML(). Grouped by section with Role, Assignee, Hebrew Name, Notes columns. Renders only when ceremonyRoles is non-empty.
New — state.js: ceremonyRoles added to DEFAULTS and ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS.
New — ws.js: ceremonyRoles added to statePayload.
New — ui.js: Ceremony Roles guide section added between Prep and Seating with 6 guide entries covering templates, sections, Hebrew names, reordering, and Day-of/Brief output.
Fix — App.jsx: Unlock button on passcode lock screen — added justifyContent: center to fix uncentered label.
Fix — App.jsx: Added '← Back to events' link below Unlock button on passcode lock screen. Navigates to /simcha/ so users without the passcode can return to the event picker.

Fix — App.jsx: lock screen overlay background changed from var(--bg-page) to rgba(0,0,0,0.4) with backdropFilter blur(6px) and WebkitBackdropFilter for Safari. Dashboard content is now blurred and dimmed behind the passcode card rather than obscured by a solid fill.
New — router.js: passcodeProtected boolean added to GET /api/events response. Value is !!(cfg.accessPasscode) — never exposes the passcode value itself.
New — public/index.html: 🔑 Protected tag renders on picker cards for passcode-protected events. Tag is suppressed when the event is also archived (archived tag takes precedence).

New — App.jsx: event-level access passcode lock screen. When adminConfig.accessPasscode is set, a full-screen lock screen renders before the dashboard. Inherits event theme and palette. Session-scoped unlock — correct entry persists for the browser session. Three state variables: passcodeUnlocked, passcodeInput, passcodeError.

New — AdminPanel.jsx: Access Passcode section added to Security tab. Set Passcode and Confirm Passcode inputs, savePasscode and removePasscode handlers. Saves via existing /api/admin/settings endpoint. Shows current status badge when a passcode is set. Remove Passcode button appears only when one is active. Warning: if passcode is forgotten it can only be removed via Admin Mode password.
New — ui.js: Access Passcode guide entry added to Admin Mode section. Explains difference between access passcode (view protection) and Admin Mode password (config protection), and recovery path.

Fix — Modals.jsx: Versioning section moved from between Roadmap and Known Issues to the bottom of the modal, after UX Audit Items. New order: What's New banner, Changelog, Roadmap, Known Issues, UX Audit Items, Versioning.

New — Modals.jsx: showOpenOnly state added to WhatsNewModal. Toggle button in modal header switches between 'Show open only' and 'Showing open only'. When active: Roadmap hides complete items, Known Issues hides resolved items, UX Audit Items hides complete items. Audit item count badge updates to show open count when filter is active. Toggle defaults to off (show all) and resets on modal close.
Fix — changelog.json: audit-f5 (Batch RSVP status update) status corrected from 'resolved' to 'complete' to match the standard closed status for audit items.

Fix — public/index.html: .event-card-body padding changed from '0 20px 16px' to '16px 20px' and justify-content changed to center. Previous attempts applied only one of the two required changes — zero top padding caused content to sit flush against the header even when centered, and flex-end with no top padding pushed content against the footer border. Both changes together produce correct equal spacing above and below the content.

Fix — public/index.html: .event-card-body justify-content changed from center to flex-end. Content (date, household count) now aligns to the bottom of the card body, creating a consistent visual baseline across cards with different amounts of detail.

Fix — public/index.html: justify-content: center added to .event-card-body. Card body content (date, household count) now centers vertically within the card middle section instead of aligning to the top.
Fix — changelog.json: known issue #3 (cityStateZip combined field) marked resolved. Was fixed in V2.40.3 when structured address fields were deployed across all entry points.
Fix — changelog.json: known issue #7 (EVENT_ID hardcoded to Sydney's event) marked resolved. Was fixed in V2.46.0 with the dynamic IIFE derivation from window.location.pathname.
Fix — router.js: POST /api/events and DELETE /api/events/:eventId endpoints added. These were built in V2.50.0 but not deployed to the NAS. clearBoardState imported from state.js.
Fix — router.js: clearBoardState added to state.js require import.

Fix — public/index.html: delete confirmation overlay moved from inside the <a> card element to document.body. Positioned using getBoundingClientRect() — appears below the card (or above if near the bottom of the viewport), clamped horizontally within the viewport. A transparent backdrop appended to body closes the overlay when clicking outside. Eliminates the Safari bubbling issue where clicks inside the overlay triggered navigation on the parent <a> tag.

Fix — public/index.html: .delete-confirm-overlay CSS changed from position:absolute to position:fixed with z-index:1000. .delete-confirm-backdrop added as a fixed full-screen transparent layer behind the overlay.

Fix — router.js: GET /api/events now scans both the data/ directory (configured events) and the public/ directory (provisioned folders). Public folders with an index.html but no data file are included as stub entries with empty name/type so they appear in the picker as Unnamed Event cards. seenIds map prevents duplicates. Previously newly created events were invisible in the picker until first opened.

Fix — public/index.html: pageshow event listener added. When the picker page is restored from the browser's back/forward cache (bfcache), loadEvents() is called to re-fetch the event list. Previously, navigating to a new event and pressing Back showed a stale cached list that omitted the newly created event.

Fix — public/index.html: Create button onclick attribute removed. addEventListener('click', createEvent) now attached in showNewEventForm() and removed in hideNewEventForm(). Safari was throwing 'Not enough arguments' TypeError when createEvent was invoked via the onclick attribute wrapper, but not when called directly. Root cause: Safari WebKit onclick attribute handler incompatibility in this context. Switching to addEventListener resolves it consistently.
New — state.js: clearBoardState(boardId) function added. Removes a board from the in-memory cache so a recreated event starts fresh. Added to module.exports.

New — router.js: POST /api/events endpoint. Validates event ID (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens; 2–50 chars; no leading/trailing hyphen; folder must not exist; dist/index.html must exist). Creates public/{eventId}/ folder and copies client/dist/index.html into it. Returns { ok, eventId, url }.

New — router.js: DELETE /api/events/:eventId endpoint. Removes public/{eventId}/ folder, deletes data/simcha-{eventId}.json if present, and clears in-memory board state via clearBoardState(). Returns { ok }.
New — router.js: clearBoardState imported from state.js.

New — public/index.html: + New Event button added to page header row. Opens an inline creation form with event ID input, live URL preview, client-side validation (auto-lowercase, invalid char strip), Create and Cancel actions. On success navigates to the new event URL.

New — public/index.html: Delete button (✕) added to each event card header. Visible on hover (desktop) and always visible (mobile). Clicking shows an inline confirmation overlay on the card: type-the-event-ID pattern, Confirm Delete and Cancel buttons. On success fades out the card; shows empty state if no events remain.

New — router.js: picker-config.json helpers added (loadPickerConfig, savePickerConfig). File lives at simchakit root, auto-created on first request, stores bcrypt-hashed picker password. In-memory rate limiter added: 5 attempts per IP per 60 seconds.
New — router.js: GET /api/picker/status endpoint. Returns { protected: true/false }. No auth required. Called by index.html on load.
New — router.js: POST /api/picker/verify endpoint. Compares submitted password against bcrypt hash. Rate-limited. Returns { ok: true } or { ok: false, error }.

New — router.js: POST /api/picker/password endpoint. Sets or changes picker password. Requires current password if one is already set. Accepts empty newPassword to remove protection. Minimum 8 characters enforced.
New — router.js: bcryptjs added as dependency (require('bcryptjs')). Must run npm install at /path/to/web before server restart.

New — public/index.html: auth screen added. Shown when picker is protected and sessionStorage has no valid token. Centered card with password input, Unlock button, inline error, and Enter key support. On success stores simchakit_picker_auth='1' in sessionStorage.

New — public/index.html: Picker Settings panel added in footer (visible only when authenticated). Change password form with current/new/confirm fields, Save Password button, and Remove Protection option with confirmation dialog.

New — public/index.html: init() flow checks /api/picker/status on load. If unprotected or sessionStorage token present, shows main content directly. If protected and no token, shows auth screen. Fails open on network error to avoid locking out users.
New — .gitignore created at SimchaKit root. Excludes: node_modules/, client/dist/, data/, picker-config.json, .DS_Store, *.log.
Docs — DEPLOY.md and HOW_TO_DEPLOY.md updated. Server-side npm install step added to first-time setup. picker-config.json and .gitignore documented in file structure and rebuild table.

Fix — deploy.sh: header comments updated. Removed hardcoded Synology NAS path (/volume1/web/simchakit/). Replaced with generic /path/to/simchakit/ placeholder and added note that no editing is required — the script locates itself automatically via dirname.
Fix — HOW_TO_DEPLOY.md: Step 4 updated to explicitly state that deploy.sh requires no editing before use. Resolves known issue #8.
Fix — App.css: .admin-section-nav class added with flex-wrap: wrap. Replaces the previous single non-wrapping row that overflowed the modal width on mobile.
Fix — AdminPanel.jsx: section nav container div updated from inline style to className='admin-section-nav'. Individual button styles unchanged. Resolves known issue #11.

Known issue #11 logged — Admin Mode section tab bar renders as a single non-wrapping horizontal row, overflowing the modal width on mobile and requiring horizontal scroll to reach tabs beyond the visible area.

Guide — ui.js: 'Visible tabs' entry added to Admin Mode section. Documents the Tabs section in Admin Mode, how to hide and restore tabs, and the Show all tabs reset. 'Accessing Admin Mode' entry updated to mention the 🔓 Exit Admin Mode button shipped in V2.47.0.

New — App.jsx: ALL_TABS constant replaces inline tabs array. visibleTabIds derived from adminConfig.visibleTabs. tabs filtered to include overview always plus any IDs in visibleTabIds. Falls back to ALL_TABS when visibleTabs is absent or empty — safe default for all existing events.
New — App.jsx: useEffect added to redirect activeTab to 'overview' if the currently active tab is hidden by a visibleTabs change.

New — AdminPanel.jsx: 'Tabs' section added between Theme and Security. Checklist of 10 hideable tabs (Overview excluded). Checking/unchecking a tab adds/removes its ID from form.visibleTabs. 'Show all tabs' button resets visibleTabs to empty array (all visible). Save Configuration persists the setting via existing admin config save endpoint. Addresses audit-f7.

Fix — theme.js: accent-dark values added to all 9 palettes (rose, navy-gold, forest, purple, slate, copper, teal, charcoal, blush). Values derived by darkening accent 18% for lighter palettes (L ≥ 0.35) and 12% for darker ones (L < 0.35) in HSL space.

Fix — color.js: darkenAccent(hex) helper added. Uses hexToHSL/hslToHex with adaptive darkening (12% or 18% depending on luminance). deriveCustomPalette updated to include accent-dark in both light and dark return objects. darkenAccent added to exports.

Fix — ThemeProvider.jsx: --accent-dark injected per palette in both the standard palette branch (from PALETTES[palette]['accent-dark']) and the custom palette branch (from deriveCustomPalette light/dark objects). Resolves the root cause: --accent-dark previously always fell back to :root's #5a2b3c (rose/burgundy) regardless of active palette. Addresses audit-f3.

New — App.jsx: Exit Admin Mode button added to header actions row. Renders conditionally when adminPassword is set (Admin Mode is active). Clicking sets adminPassword to null, immediately exiting Admin Mode. Uses existing icon-btn class, consistent with Search and Admin buttons. Addresses audit-f4.

Fix — App.jsx: EVENT_ID constant replaced with a runtime IIFE that derives the board ID from window.location.pathname. URL pattern /simcha/{id}/ → parts[1] = '{id}' → EVENT_ID = 'simcha-{id}'. Falls back to 'simcha-default' if pathname cannot be parsed. Previously hardcoded as 'simcha-sydney-mitzvah-2026', causing every event folder to subscribe to Sydney's board on load.

Fix — HOW_TO_DEPLOY.md and DEPLOY.md: EVENT_ID note updated. Adding a new event no longer requires any code change or rebuild — create the public folder, copy dist/index.html once, and the app derives its own board ID from the URL automatically.

New — TasksTab.jsx: completing a task that was promoted from a Smart Suggestion now intercepts the completion when the linked record is still unresolved. Two write-back paths: (1) sourceCollection === 'expenses' and expense.paid === false — offers to mark the expense paid; (2) sourceCollection === 'prep' and prep.status !== 'Complete' — offers to mark the prep item Complete with progress 100.
New — TasksTab.jsx: linkConfirm state added. Holds { task, action, label } for the pending confirmation. action values: 'markPaid' | 'markPrepComplete'.
New — TasksTab.jsx: completeTask(t) helper extracted from toggleDone. Shared by both the direct path (no link) and the handleLinkConfirm path (post-confirmation). Eliminates duplication.

New — TasksTab.jsx: toggleDone rewritten. On completion of a task with sourceId + sourceCollection, checks for a qualifying unresolved linked record. If found, sets linkConfirm and returns without completing. Falls through to completeTask() when no qualifying link exists, linked record is already resolved, or task is being reopened.

New — TasksTab.jsx: handleLinkConfirm(withWriteBack). When withWriteBack is true: calls updateData('expenses', ...) for markPaid or updateData('prep', ...) for markPrepComplete, then appends a cross-tab audit log entry. Then calls completeTask() regardless of withWriteBack. Clears linkConfirm.
New — TasksTab.jsx: handleAddSuggestion now carries sourceId and sourceCollection onto the prefilled task record. Previously these fields were dropped, making write-back impossible.

New — TasksTab.jsx: link confirm modal added after the delete confirm modal. Shows expense description or prep item title. Buttons: Cancel, Complete Task Only (btn-secondary), Mark as Paid or Mark as Complete (btn-primary).
Guide — ui.js Tasks section: Smart suggestions entry updated. New paragraph documents write-back behavior and the confirmation prompt.

Fix — TasksTab.jsx: link confirm modal primary button labels shortened. 'Mark Paid + Complete' → 'Mark as Paid'. 'Mark Complete + Complete' → 'Mark as Complete'. Previous labels exceeded the modal footer width on desktop, clipping the Cancel button.

Fix — TasksTab.jsx: link confirm modal button container replaced from inline flexDirection:column div with className='modal-footer'. Previous inline stacked layout rendered buttons vertically on desktop, not matching the approved mockup. modal-footer base rule gives horizontal inline layout on desktop. @media (max-width:640px) override gives full-width stacked layout on mobile. Confirmed via App.css inspection.
New — FavorsTab.jsx: section header moved outside the favorConfig.givingFavors conditional. Section title always renders — shows favorConfig.favorDescription when set, 'Favors' otherwise.
New — FavorsTab.jsx: Favor Setup block converted to a collapsible .card. setupOpen initializes to !favorConfig.givingFavors — expanded on first visit, collapsed once configured.
New — FavorsTab.jsx: Checking 'Are you giving out favors?' automatically collapses the setup card.
New — FavorsTab.jsx: Collapsed setup card shows a one-line summary of current settings.
Fix — FavorsTab.jsx: 'No favors planned' empty state removed. Setup card handles unconfigured state.
Fix — FavorsTab.jsx: Export and Add Manually buttons moved to section header, consistent with all other tabs.
Guide — ui.js Favors section: 'Favor tracking' entry rewritten. New 'Adding favor recipients' entry added.

Fix — App.css: section-header titles centering horizontally on mobile (Overview, Guests, Budget, Tasks, Vendors). Root cause confirmed via DevTools: the base .section-header rule (align-items:center) is declared after the @media (max-width:640px) block that sets align-items:flex-start. Same specificity, later source position wins. Fix: added .section-header { align-items: flex-start } inside the @media (max-width:640px) block that follows the base rule. Desktop align-items:center preserved for vertical alignment of title/button row.

New — TaskInsights component added to TasksTab.jsx. Collapsible card between stat cards and Suggestions panel. Collapsed by default — summary subtitle always visible showing completion percentage, remaining count, and overdue count.
New — Chart 1: Completion Progress. Single horizontal stacked bar: done (green), remaining (accent, 35% opacity), overdue (red). Percentage label to the right of the bar.
New — Chart 2: Incomplete Tasks by Category. Horizontal bar, sorted descending, cycling accent colors. Only rendered when more than one category has incomplete tasks.
New — Chart 3: Incomplete Tasks by Priority. Horizontal bar for High (red), Medium (gold), Low (green) open tasks. Fixed order, only priorities with at least one incomplete task rendered.
New — Charts 2 and 3 side by side on desktop using .guest-insights-top-row CSS grid. Stack to single column on mobile.
New — Recharts imports added to TasksTab.jsx. useMemo added to React import.
Guide — ui.js Tasks section: Task Insights entry added between Manual tasks and Smart suggestions.

Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: Guest Breakdown chart legend clipping fixed. Recharts Legend component replaced with a plain flex row of color swatches + labels rendered below the PieChart. Legend import removed from Recharts import list.
New — GuestInsights component added to GuestsTab.jsx. Collapsible card between Catering Summary and filter bar. Open by default on first visit.
New — Chart 1: RSVP Breakdown. Horizontal bar by RSVP status, status-matched colors, count and percentage tooltip.
New — Chart 2: Guest Breakdown. Donut chart showing adults vs. kids. Value labels inside slices, custom tooltip.
New — Chart 3: Households by Group. Horizontal bar sorted by count descending. Only rendered when more than one group has data.
New — App.css: .guest-insights-top-row grid layout added. Mobile single-column override at 640px.
Guide — ui.js Guests section: Guest Insights entry added. Budget section: Budget Insights, Tracking expenses, and Budgeted vs. actual entries updated. Backfills V2.41.0 guide gap.

Fix — BudgetInsights: Spend by Category chart legend no longer shows a 'Budgeted' color swatch. No Bar renders the budgeted value in Chart 1 — the swatch was a false affordance. Budgeted amount still shown in Chart 1 hover tooltip and in the Est. vs. Actual chart (Chart 3).
New — BudgetInsights component added to BudgetTab.jsx. Collapsible card between stat cards and Gratuity Calculator. Open by default.
New — Chart 1: Spend by Category. Horizontal stacked bar (paid / outstanding). Total label on right. Custom tooltip.
New — Chart 2: Upcoming Payments. Vertical bar by month for unpaid expenses with dueDate. Soonest month in red.
New — Chart 3: Est. vs. Actual. Horizontal grouped bar comparing actual vs. budgeted per category. Actual bar turns red when over budget. Only shown when any expense has a budgeted value.
Fix — Existing custom CSS category bars card removed from BudgetTab. Replaced by Chart 1 inside BudgetInsights.
New — App.css: Budget Insights and chart CSS classes added.
New — package.json: recharts ^2.12.7 added to dependencies.
New — useMemo added to BudgetTab.jsx imports.

Fix — GiftsTab.jsx: Resolved address display for linked households now uses formatAddress() + migrateCityStateZip() for backward compatibility.
Fix — GiftsTab.jsx: GiftModal form state updated — single freeform address field replaced with address1, address2, city, stateProvince, postalCode, country fields.

Fix — VendorModal.jsx: Vendor address replaced with full structured address fields (address1, address2, city, stateProvince, postalCode, country). Country-aware state/province dropdown and adaptive postal code label. Soft postal code format warning for US, Canada, UK, and Australia. Contract Amount moved out of grid to stand alone.
Fix — VendorsTab.jsx: Vendor card footer address display updated to use formatAddress().

Fix — exports.js: Both getAddress() functions in gift CSV export and gift print HTML updated to use formatAddress() + migrateCityStateZip() for household-linked addresses, and formatAddress() for non-linked donor addresses.
Fix — ui.js: Guide text updated to describe structured address fields (street, city, state/province, postal code, country).
Note — Patch 3 of 3. Known issue #3 fully resolved across all address entry points.

Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: Soft postal code format warning added to household address form (add-mode and edit-mode). For US, Canada, UK, and Australia, a gold warning message appears beneath the postal code field if the entered value does not match the expected pattern for that country. Warning only shows when the field has a value. Saving is never blocked.

Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: Household address form (add-mode and edit-mode) updated to use structured city, stateProvince, postalCode, country fields. Country selector shows full ~195-country list. Selecting United States, Canada, Australia, Mexico, or United Kingdom shows the appropriate state/province dropdown with correct labels. All other countries show a free-text Region field. Postal code label adapts (ZIP Code, Postal Code, Postcode).
Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: Address Line 2 field added to address form in both add and edit modes.

Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: Migration useEffect — on load, if an existing household record has cityStateZip populated but city empty, the value is automatically migrated to the city field. Existing data is preserved.
Fix — GuestsTab.jsx: Household row expanded panel uses formatAddress() for address display. Handles both migrated and new-format records.
Fix — AccommodationsTab.jsx: Location display updated to use formatAddress() + migrateCityStateZip() for backward compatibility.
Note — Patch 2 of 3. Gifts, vendors, exports, and guide ship in Patch 3.

New — guests.js: Structured address fields. cityStateZip combined field replaced with city, stateProvince, and postalCode across all address records (households, gifts, vendors). Five country-aware state/province dropdown lists added: US (56 options incl. territories), Canada (13 provinces/territories), Australia (8 states/territories), Mexico (32 states), UK (4 regions). All other countries use free-text State / Province / Region input.
New — guests.js: COUNTRIES constant — full sorted list of ~195 countries exported for use in UI dropdowns.

New — guests.js: getAddressFields(country) helper — returns stateLabel, postalLabel, and stateOptions for the given country. Single source of truth used by all three address forms (households, gifts, vendors).
New — guests.js: formatAddress(record) helper — assembles city + stateProvince + postalCode + country into a display string. Omits country when United States. Used everywhere address is rendered.
New — guests.js: migrateCityStateZip(record) helper — migrates legacy cityStateZip value into city field for existing records. Preserves all existing data.
Fix — guests.js: generateCSVTemplate updated — CityStateZip column replaced with City, StateProvince, PostalCode columns. Example row updated.

Fix — guests.js: importCSVToGuestData updated — maps new City/StateProvince/PostalCode columns. Backward compatible: if old CityStateZip column is present and City is empty, value is migrated to city field.

Fix — guests.js: exportToInvitationCSV updated — exports structured City, State / Province, Postal Code, Country columns instead of combined City, State Zip column. Uses migrateCityStateZip for backward compatibility with existing records.
Note — Patch 1 of 3. UI changes (GuestsTab, GiftsTab, VendorModal, AccommodationsTab, exports.js, ui.js) ship in Patches 2 and 3.

New — Gifts tab: mobile card layout. On viewports under 640px, the 9-column table (712px wide) is replaced by a card list. Each card shows: giver name, gift type badge, amount, Written (W) and Mailed (M) checkboxes, and edit/delete actions. A › chevron expands each card to reveal description, date received, and attended status. Desktop table layout is pixel-perfect identical. isMobile state uses a resize listener for live updates. expandedCards state uses a Set for O(1) expand/collapse tracking. No nested component definitions.

Fix — Modal browser chrome overlap (root cause fix): desktop .modal-backdrop base rule was declared after the @media (max-width: 640px) block in App.css, causing it to override the mobile rules due to CSS cascade order. Moved the entire modal block (modal-backdrop, modal, modal-header, modal-body, modal-footer) to before the mobile media query. Mobile override now correctly takes precedence. Diagnosed via DevTools console which showed only the global rule being applied.

Fix — Modal chrome overlap on iOS Safari: modal backdrop now uses env(safe-area-inset-top) and env(safe-area-inset-bottom) padding to clear the browser address bar and native navigation bar. viewport-fit=cover is confirmed set in index.html so both env() variables return real values. Modal panel max-height changed from 92vh to 88svh — svh (small viewport height) is the viewport size when all browser chrome is fully visible, ensuring the modal never overflows into the chrome regardless of scroll state. Desktop modals completely unaffected.
Fix — audit-m006: RSVP status pill on mobile now has min-height 36px, font-size 12px, and larger padding. Previously 20px tall — too small to tap accurately. Desktop appearance unchanged.

Fix — audit-m009: Two-column form layouts (.form-grid-2) inside modals now stack to a single column on mobile. Previously side-by-side inputs were ~140px wide each — too narrow for comfortable text entry on a phone.

Fix — audit-m010: Modal footer buttons are now full-width and stacked on mobile (column-reverse so primary action is on top). Desktop inline layout unchanged. column-reverse ensures Cancel stays below the primary action, matching standard mobile form patterns.
Fix — audit-m012: Calendar event titles in list view now wrap to a second line on mobile instead of truncating with ellipsis. Desktop truncation behavior unchanged.

Fix — Search overlay on mobile: panel is now top-anchored instead of bottom-anchored. On iOS Safari, position:fixed bottom-sheet panels render behind the keyboard because fixed elements anchor to the layout viewport, not the visible viewport. Top-anchoring keeps the search input visible above the keyboard at all times — matching the iOS Spotlight / native search pattern. max-height reduced from 85vh to 50vh (keyboard occupies ~40-45vh on mobile, leaving comfortable space for results). Border radius flipped: flat top, rounded bottom.

Fix — Guide modal dark mode: expanded section header row background changed from section.colorLight to var(--bg-subtle). colorLight values (e.g. accent-light = #2a1820 in dark mode) rendered as a clashing pinkish-dark tone. bg-subtle (#231f1c) provides a clean, neutral step above the body background in all themes.
Fix — Guide modal: section icon box border changed from hardcoded ${section.color}22 (hex + opacity append, broken with CSS variables) to var(--border), which correctly adapts to light and dark mode.

New — Sync status indicator moved from header to footer. Now appears as the last item in the footer bar (after version number), reading '● Live', '● Offline', 'Syncing...', 'Connecting', or '⏳ N pending'. Tooltip on hover shows last saved time. Follows standard SaaS design pattern (Figma, Notion, VS Code) of placing ambient status in the footer, not the header.
Fix — Mobile header is now a clean two-row layout: Row 1 shows ← Events · ✡ SimchaKit · action icons; Row 2 shows event name and theme name. No sync indicator competing for header space.
Fix — Removed orphaned sync-label-desktop and sync-label-mobile CSS rules (no longer needed — single footer sync element replaces the desktop/mobile split).
Fix — Removed sync-indicator mobile header override from App.css (no longer in header).
Guide — 'How SimchaKit works' entry updated: sync indicator location changed from header to footer.
Guide — 'Sync & offline' entry updated: reflects footer placement and removes reference to mobile abbreviated form.

Fix — audit-m001: Section header action buttons (+ Add Household, + Add Vendor, etc.) now have min-height: 44px on mobile, meeting the Apple HIG / Google Material touch target minimum. Scoped to .section-header .btn-sm only — row-level icon buttons unchanged.
Fix — audit-m002: Header action icons (Search, Admin ⚙, More ⋯) now have 44×44px tap areas on mobile via .header-actions .icon-btn override. Visual icon size unchanged.
Fix — audit-m004: Stat card labels (.stat-label) increased from 10px to 12px on mobile. Desktop size unchanged at 11px.

Fix — audit-m007: Header ⋯ overflow menu now closes when tapping or clicking outside it on any device. Uses mousedown and touchstart listeners on document, scoped to dismiss only when click originates outside .header-overflow-wrap.
Fix — audit-m008: Sync indicator now shows 'Live' text on mobile when connected and no saved timestamp is available. Previously only the 7px dot was visible.
Fix — audit-m011: Search button tooltip on mobile now reads 'Search' instead of 'Search (⌘K)'. The ⌘K hint is still shown on desktop.
Fix — audit-m013: Bottom nav tab labels increased from 10px to 11px for improved legibility on small screens.

Fix — More drawer: bottom anchor restored to calc(60px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)) so the drawer always sits above the bottom nav bar. max-height increased from 60vh to 85vh so all drawer items (including Calendar at the bottom) are fully visible without being obscured. This fix was previously lost due to a file sourcing error (uploads/ used instead of outputs/) and is now correctly applied and tracked.

Fix — audit-m002 (final): Header icon buttons on mobile are now borderless and transparent, matching standard mobile app patterns (iOS/Android). Tap area is 44px via padding — the visual icon stays small with no visible box. Active state retains accent-light background with border-radius. Desktop icon button appearance unchanged.

New — Admin → Theme: Live preview panel added below the palette swatches. Shows a miniature header strip (gradient using header-bg and accent colors), a primary button, and a stat card rendered in the selected palette's actual hex colors. Updates instantly on every palette click — including Custom color. Preview uses the event name, theme name, and icon from the form. Changes only apply to the live app when Save is clicked. No existing save/apply logic affected.

Fix — Guests tab: 'All RSVPs received' banner no longer shows when there are zero households. Previously allResponded was computed as rsvpPending === 0, which evaluated to true on an empty guest list. Fixed by adding households.length > 0 guard.

Fix — audit-013: Empty state consistency audit complete. Guests tab zero-data empty state now includes a '+ Add Household' CTA button (was text-only). Button respects archive mode. Filter-empty state ('No guests match your filters') unchanged.

Fix — audit-013: Favors tab empty state description updated from 'Click a person in the Available panel to add them' to 'Select people from the Available panel on the right to add them to the list' — clearer and more descriptive.
Verified — audit-013: Gifts tab already had emoji, title, description, and CTA. Budget, Vendors, Tasks, Prep, Seating, Accommodations, Calendar all passed. No changes needed on those tabs.
Verified — audit-002: Countdown banner already displays venue from mainEvent.venue. Renders as '· Venue Name' next to the event date on line 71 of OverviewTab.jsx. No code change needed.

Fix — audit-005: Added title tooltip attributes to all icon-only close and action buttons that were missing them. Covers: 7 buttons in AdminPanel (modal close buttons, timeline edit/delete), 2 in TasksTab (modal close buttons), 5 in SeatingTab (Delete Table, print preview, Manage Assignments, Add/Edit Table, Export modal close buttons), 1 in CalendarTab (event popover close), 1 in App.jsx (brief print modal close). All existing titled buttons were left untouched.
Fix — Known Issue #9: Resolved as a side effect of UX audit Session 5 (V2.28.0) which moved the Print Brief button out of the stat card grid. Issue no longer reproducible. Marked resolved.

Fix — Known Issue #10: More drawer bottom anchor changed from bottom: 0 to bottom: calc(60px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)). The drawer was anchored behind the fixed bottom nav bar (z-index 400 > drawer z-index 350), causing the last item (Calendar) to be hidden behind the nav bar on all devices. Anchoring the drawer above the nav bar fixes the issue on all screen sizes and devices.

Verified — audit-v1: Event-type conditional UI is partially implemented. Header icon and Torah Portion card already adapt to event type. Known gaps: Kippot Needed and Kosher Meals stat cards in the Guests tab are always visible regardless of event type. These are documented as intentional low-priority items — not blocking, and potentially useful for mixed-tradition events. No code change this session.

Verified — audit-v2: No new Venue field needed in Admin Mode. Timeline entries already have a venue field, exposed in TimelineEntryModal and consumed by the Event Brief (mainEvent.venue). audit-004 (add top-level Venue field) is superseded — the gap does not exist.

Verified — audit-v3: Vendor and task status badge colors are not hardcoded. All badge colors derive from CSS variables (var(--green-light), var(--accent-light), etc.) via VENDOR_STATUS_STYLES and TASK_PRIORITY_STYLES constants. Badge colors respond correctly to theme and dark mode. No code change needed.
Fix — Admin → Event Details: Notes field placeholder updated to clarify purpose. Helper text added below the textarea: 'Internal planning notes — not shown to guests'.

Fix — Event Brief: Organizer Notes section added at the end of the printed brief when Admin → Event Details Notes field is populated. Renders as a styled block with preserved line breaks. Section is omitted entirely when the field is empty.
Fix — Admin → Accommodations: Hotel Website field now shows a 'Visit →' link next to the label when a URL is entered. Link opens in a new tab. Only visible when a URL is present.

Fix — Vendors: Payment progress bar on vendor cards increased from 5px to 8px height. A '{paid} of {contract} paid · {pct}%' label now appears above the bar. Percentage turns green when fully paid. Only shown when a contract amount is set.
Verified — audit-032: Task category group headers already display item counts in parentheses (e.g. 'Planning (8)'). Implemented on line 385 of TasksTab.jsx. No code change needed.
Fix — Seating: Table card capacity bar height increased from 5px to 8px. A '{filled}/{cap} seats · {pct}%' label now appears above the bar so capacity is readable without squinting.

Fix — Seating: Unseated panel now groups people by household with a muted household header row above each group, matching the pattern used in the Manage Assignments modal. Makes it easier to seat family units together.

Fix — Seating: Table cards whose name matches the default pattern 'Table N' now show a subtle italic hint 'Click ✎ to rename this table' below the table name. Tables with custom names show no hint. Hint is suppressed during person-assignment mode.

Fix — Calendar: List/Month view preference now persists across tab switches within the same session. viewMode state lifted from CalendarTab local state to App.jsx (calendarView / setCalendarView props). Switching to another tab and back preserves the selected view. Resets on full page reload.
Fix — Calendar: Month view day cell min-height reduced from 80px to 50px (desktop) and 54px to 46px (mobile). Empty cells are more compact; cells with events still expand naturally to fit content.

Verified — audit-035: Calendar month view chip colors already match the legend dot colors exactly. cal-grid-chip-* classes use the same CSS variables as cal-dot-* classes (e.g. both task entries use var(--blue)). No code change needed.
Fix — App.css: .app-nav sticky positioning (position:sticky, top:60px, z-index:190) was lost when the pre-fix App.css was re-uploaded during Session 5. Reapplied.

Fix — Overview: '+ Add Event' button in the Event Timeline card header now opens Admin Mode directly to the Timeline section instead of Event Details. Implemented via new initialSection prop on AdminPanel and onOpenAdminTo callback in App.jsx.
Guide — Tips & Shortcuts: added 'Tab indicators' entry documenting the populated dot behavior on nav tabs.
Guide — Tips & Shortcuts: updated 'Print Brief' entry to reflect that the button is now in the Overview tab header, not a stat card.

New — Overview: Event Timeline card header now includes a small '+ Add Event' button that opens Admin Mode directly. Hidden when event is archived.

Fix — Admin → Theme: Theme Name field hint updated to explain its purpose: 'A personalized tagline displayed below your event name in the app header. Use it for a theme name, a hashtag, or a fun phrase.'

New — Tab nav: populated indicator dot appears on Vendors, Prep, Seating, Gifts, and Favors tabs when they contain at least one record. Dot is suppressed when a numeric badge is already shown. Desktop nav only.
Fix — Guests tab: '2A 2K' count shorthand now shows a tooltip on hover: 'X Adults, Y Kids'. Applied to both the desktop row counts and the mobile meta row.

Fix — Admin → Timeline: '⭐ Main Event' badge now has a tooltip explaining its significance: 'The Main Event drives the countdown clock on the Overview tab. Only one timeline entry should be marked as the Main Event.'

Fix — Admin → Guests: 'Reset to defaults' buttons in Guest Groups, Meal Choices, and Sizes sections are now visually muted (reduced opacity) to distinguish them from the primary '+ Add' actions next to them.
Verified — audit-020: Household row header was already fully clickable with cursor:pointer set in CSS. No code change needed.
Verified — audit-027: New sizes added via '+ Add Size' already inherit the placeholder text from the shared input map. No code change needed.

Fix — Admin → Data: Archive Event button changed from red (btn-danger) to amber (btn-warning) to distinguish it visually from Reset Event Data. Added '↩ Reversible' badge to Archive section title and '⚠ Permanent' badge to Reset section title.

Fix — Admin → Data: Archive unlock code now requires a second 'Confirm Unlock Code' input. Archive button is disabled until both fields match. Inline mismatch hint shown as user types. Warning banner added: 'Save this code somewhere safe — it cannot be recovered if lost.'

Fix — App.css: Added btn-warning class using gold CSS variables (gold-light background, gold border, gold text; gold-medium on hover).
Fix — Budget: Next Payment Due stat card no longer truncates the description or amount with ellipsis. Text now wraps within the card so the full amount is always visible.
Fix — Budget: Est. vs. Actual stat card now shows '▲ Over Budget' in red or '▼ Under Budget' in green instead of a raw signed dollar amount. Dollar amount moved to the sub-label for clarity.
Fix — Budget: Gratuity Calculator now opens expanded by default when tippable vendors are present. Can still be collapsed by clicking the header.
Fix — Budget: Spend by category legend replaced with colored swatches (paid, outstanding, budget estimate) positioned above the bars. Previously was small muted text that was easy to miss.

Fix — UX Audit Items section in What's New modal: 'complete' status was missing from auditStatusColors map, causing completed items to fall through to the '🔭 Future' style. Added complete entry with green styling and '✅ Complete' label.

Fix — Desktop tab nav bar was not sticky — it scrolled out of view on any downward scroll, making tab switching impossible without scrolling back to the top. Added position:sticky, top:60px (header height), and z-index:190 to .app-nav in App.css.

Fix — Toast notification div had duplicate 'transform' keys in its style object, causing a Vite esbuild error at build time. Removed the static translateX(-50%) key; the animated transform property now carries the full value in both visible and hidden states.

New — Toast notifications: a brief confirmation message appears at the bottom of the screen after every add, edit, or delete action across all tabs (Guests, Budget, Vendors, Tasks, Prep, Seating, Gifts, Favors, Accommodations). Auto-dismisses after 2.5 seconds. Positioned above the mobile bottom nav bar.

Fix — Scroll position now resets to the top of the page on every tab switch (desktop nav, mobile bottom bar, and More drawer). Eliminates the blank area that appeared above content when switching from a scrolled-down tab.
Fix — OFFLINE sync indicator tooltip now reads 'You are offline — changes will sync automatically when your connection is restored.' Previously showed no guidance text when disconnected.
Fix — Server Logs link in the footer is now hidden unless Admin Mode is active. Reduces developer-facing noise for regular users.
Guide — Tips & Shortcuts: added 'Confirmation toasts' entry explaining the new toast notification behavior.
